instruction: Write an Apex trigger on the Account object that, whenever a record is updated, sets a custom field 'Last_Modified_By_Trigger__c' to the current user's name.
Write a SOQL query that retrieves all Contacts along with their related Account's Name and Industry, where the Account's AnnualRevenue is greater than 1,000,000.
Create an Apex class with a static method that takes a List<Id> of Opportunity Ids and returns a Map<Id, Decimal> of Opportunity Id to the total Amount of its related OpportunityLineItems.
Write a Salesforce validation rule formula that prevents saving an Opportunity if CloseDate is in the past and StageName is not 'Closed Won' or 'Closed Lost'.
Write an Apex Queueable class that calls an external REST API via HTTP callout and updates a custom field 'Sync_Status__c' on the originating record with the response status code.
Create a Lightning Web Component with a search input that calls an imperative Apex method `searchAccounts(String searchTerm)` and displays the returned Account names in a list.

Write an Apex test class (@isTest) for a trigger that sets Contact.Description when its related Account is updated. Include a positive test (Account updated) and a negative test (no related Contacts).
